description: Style NoteWith its unusual colour story and chic styling this wallet from baggit easily makes it into our wishlist this Summer. Carry it with western and ethnic outfits to infuse a touch of  glamour to your ensemble. Its multiple pockets and slots help you stay organised- in style.Product DetailsThree fold brown wallet with gold and blue printPleat, panel and buckle details on the frontOnce opened six credit card slots, one photo id card holder and one slip pocket on one side, two compartments with six credit card holders in the centre fold and branding on flapZippered pocket at backMaterials and CareFabric, syntheticWipe with damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 11 cmWidth: 19 cm
